# Exercise 1 Min

Exercise 1 Min is the official public website for a coming-soon mobile app for one-minute exercise breaks. The app is designed for people who sit too much, especially desk workers, students, people in meetings, and people who want a small exercise habit without a full workout plan.

The public site is production-ready and available for crawling and indexing.

## Core Message

One minute of exercise, on repeat.

Exercise 1 Min uses local roast reminders to prompt a quick movement break every one, two, or three hours within the schedule you choose. The default routine contains five desk-friendly moves; floor exercises are optional. It does not require a gym, equipment, accounts, or a network connection.

The minute is a promise that the break is quick, not a countdown. You move through each illustrated exercise at your own pace.

Short version: less sitting, more movement.

## How It Works

1. A reminder with bite: every 1, 2, or 3 hours within the hours you choose, one of 100 savage-but-safe roasts reminds you to move. You can start, snooze, or pause the rest of the day.
2. A routine that fits: tap start and open the exact five-move routine you previewed. It is desk-friendly by default, floor movements are opt-in, and individual movements can be replaced or excluded.
3. Back to your day: complete the routine at your own pace with no countdown. One movement break is logged and your minutes, weekly rhythm, and gentle streak grow.

## Features

- Local roast reminders on your schedule.
- Desk-friendly routines by default, with optional floor exercises.
- At-your-own-pace sessions with no countdown.
- Illustrated exercises with original animated figures.
- Quiet progress with completed breaks, minutes, weekly rhythm, and a gentle streak.
- Fully offline privacy with no analytics or network calls.
- No accounts or sign-up.
- Light and dark mode.
- English at launch.
- The core app is planned to be free.

## Sample Exercises

- High Knees: 10 seconds.
- Squats: 12 reps.
- Arm Circles: 10 seconds.
- Calf Raises: 15 reps.
- Plank Hold: 10 seconds.
- Jumping Jacks: 10 seconds.
- Chest Expansions: 10 seconds.
- Lunges: 10 reps.
- Shoulder Taps: 10 seconds.
- Stretches: 15 seconds.
- Bridges: 12 reps.
- Wide Arm Circles: 10 seconds.

## FAQ

### What is Exercise 1 Min?

Exercise 1 Min is a coming-soon mobile app for short movement breaks. It builds a desk-friendly routine, guides each move without a countdown, and gets you back to your day.

### Do I need equipment or a gym?

No. The app uses bodyweight exercises you can do at home or work. Floor exercises are optional and off by default, so the standard routine is easy to do beside a desk.

### How often should I take an exercise break?

You choose the rhythm. The app can remind you every 1, 2, or 3 hours during the hours you select, and you can snooze or skip any reminder.

### Is Exercise 1 Min private?

Yes. The mobile app works fully offline with no analytics, accounts, sign-up, or network calls, so your settings and exercise history stay on your device.

### Is the minute a countdown?

No. One minute is a promise that the break is quick, not a timer you have to beat. You move through the illustrated routine with previous and next controls at your own pace.

### Is Exercise 1 Min free?

The core app is planned to be free, with no ads, subscriptions, or upsell during the moment you are meant to exercise.

### When will the app be available?

Exercise 1 Min is coming soon for iOS and Android. The website will be updated when the app is ready to download.

## Safety

Stop if you feel pain or discomfort. Exercise 1 Min does not replace professional health advice.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://exercise1min.com
- LLM guide: https://exercise1min.com/llms.txt
- Sitemap: https://exercise1min.com/sitemap.xml
